title: Template task

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver the task outcome verified by npm run validate, preserving declared scope.
agentGoal.outcome: The task outcome is implemented and verified.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run validate and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: Do not edit files outside the declared scope.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Use the smallest change that satisfies the failing verification.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: The task has an objective acceptance criterion.
